data.title: Kruso Kapital Issues 3 Million Euro Credit Linked Note
data.description:
An announcement from Kruso Kapital S.P.A. ( (IT:KK) ) is now available.

Kruso Kapital has issued a Credit Linked Note (CLN) worth approximately 3 million euros, with Società di Gestione delle Partecipazioni in Banca Sistema S.r.l. subscribing to a significant portion. This transaction, linked to gold-backed loans, is part of a broader strategy authorized by the company’s board to issue up to 10 million euros in CLNs by 2026. The issuance reflects Kruso Kapital’s strategic focus on leveraging its expertise in pawn credit and art auctions to enhance its financial offerings, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:KK) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kruso Kapital S.P.A. stock, see the IT:KK Stock Forecast page.

More about Kruso Kapital S.P.A.

Kruso Kapital S.P.A., part of the Banca Sistema Group and listed on the Euronext Growth Milan segment of Borsa Italiana, is a pioneer in the pawn credit business and the auction market for precious items, works of art, and collectibles. Established in November 2022, the company operates through various brands in Italy, Greece, and Portugal, offering loans secured by collateral objects and engaging in the art auction market. With a presence in multiple cities and a multichannel structure, Kruso Kapital employs 145 resources.

Average Trading Volume: 2,880

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €44.3M

data.title: CALB Group Co., Ltd. Forms Strategy and Sustainable Development Committee
data.description:
The latest update is out from CALB Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3931) ).

CALB Group Co., Ltd. has established a Strategy and Sustainable Development Committee to enhance its strategic planning and ESG management. This committee will focus on developing the company’s long-term strategies, assessing significant events impacting development, and ensuring compliance with ESG standards. The initiative reflects CALB’s commitment to sustainable growth and stakeholder engagement, potentially strengthening its market position and operational resilience.

More about CALB Co., Ltd. Class H

CALB Group Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating within the industry of sustainable development and strategic planning. The company focuses on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) management, aiming to align with international standards and regulatory requirements.

data.title: British Smaller Companies VCT Announces Successful Share Offer Applications
data.description:
British Smaller Companies VCT ( (GB:BSV) ) has shared an update.

British Smaller Companies VCT plc and its counterpart, British Smaller Companies VCT2 plc, have received applications exceeding £25 million for their new share offers for the 2025/26 tax year. The companies aim to raise up to £60 million, with an additional over-allotment facility of £25 million, through prospectus offers of new ordinary shares. This initiative reflects the companies’ strategy to enhance their capital base and expand their investment capacity, potentially benefiting stakeholders by increasing investment opportunities in smaller UK companies.

More about British Smaller Companies VCT

British Smaller Companies VCT plc operates in the financial services industry, focusing on venture capital trusts. The company primarily invests in smaller UK-based companies, providing them with growth capital and supporting their development across various sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 116,661

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: IREIT Global Extends and Increases Loan Facility
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from IREIT Global ( (SG:UD1U) ).

IREIT Global has announced an amendment to its existing facility agreement with UniCredit Bank GmbH and Landesbank Hessen-Thüringen Girozentrale, increasing the loan facility to €220,760,000 and extending the maturity date to July 31, 2029. This move is significant for IREIT’s financial strategy, as it provides additional capital and extends the timeline for repayment, potentially enhancing the company’s operational flexibility and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:UD1U) stock is a Hold with a S$0.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IREIT Global stock, see the SG:UD1U Stock Forecast page.

More about IREIT Global

IREIT Global is a real estate investment trust based in Singapore, managed by IREIT Global Group Pte. Ltd. The company focuses on property investments and management, with a market focus on real estate assets.

Average Trading Volume: 686,684

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$390M

data.title: Proximar Seafood Completes Rights Issue, Boosts Share Capital
data.description:
Proximar Seafood AS ( (DE:84Q) ) has shared an update.

Proximar Seafood has successfully completed a rights issue, resulting in the subscription and allocation of 150 million shares and the issuance of an additional 13.5 million shares to underwriters. This move increases the company’s registered share capital to NOK 31,989,006, potentially strengthening its financial position and market presence.

More about Proximar Seafood AS

Proximar Seafood is a Norwegian company specializing in land-based salmon farming. It operates a production facility near Mount Fuji in Japan, utilizing high-quality groundwater to produce fresh Atlantic Salmon. The company’s strategic location near a major fish market offers cost and environmental benefits.

Current Market Cap: NOK316.7M

data.title: Rockwood Strategic Chairman Increases Shareholding
data.description:
Rockwood Realisation Plc ( (GB:RKW) ) has provided an update.

Rockwood Strategic Plc announced that its Chairman, Noel Lamb, purchased 3,200 ordinary shares of the company at a price of 279.89 pence per share. This transaction increases Mr. Lamb’s total shareholding to 37,700 shares, representing 0.07% of the company’s issued share capital, indicating a vote of confidence in the company’s prospects.

data.title: HFCL Limited Confirms Regulatory Compliance for Q3 2025
data.description:
An announcement from HFCL Limited ( (IN:HFCL) ) is now available.

HFCL Limited, a company involved in the telecommunications and technology sector, has announced its compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depository and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. The company confirmed that all securities received for dematerialization during this period were processed appropriately, listed on stock exchanges, and updated in their records, ensuring regulatory compliance and maintaining transparency with stakeholders.
